title: Canvas Art Wraps, 1.6"
description:
Elevate your space or give the gift of stunning art with our premium satin canvas prints. Expertly crafted, each piece is printed to the highest quality on durable 100% polyester canvas, offering a luxurious satin finish that enhances the beauty of your artwork. Your canvas comes pre-stretched around a sturdy 35mm frame, ready to hang with a sleek black backing and an integral hole for easy wall mounting. Available in a range of sizes from 8" x 12" to 36" x 24", this canvas is perfect for any room or occasion. Whether for your home, office, or as a thoughtful gift, it will surely impress.

.:Material: Durable 100% polyester

.:Available in 7 different sizes

.:Horizontal and vertical options available

.:Designed for indoor use

.:Includes black backing with a built-in wall hanger
